notes: Compared with v0.1.9, v0.2.0f keeps the silent-upgrade and semantic-version bootstrap fixes, then adds memory hygiene, compact Run Audit, UTF-8 discipline, activation fallback, one-time activation suggestion, and adaptive retreat.
If another execution protocol or model-native workflow already owns the task flow, Lite Demo records memory only and does not add extra planning, testing, verification, or audit ritual.

Without an explicit execution protocol, lite-anchor starts light and becomes fuller only after drift, repeated failure, forgotten correction, compression recovery failure, stable-module mistake, or high pressure.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback; v0.1.8 remains retired from public distribution.
